grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Clear structured checklist with sections for Documentation Review, Searches and Enquiries, and Financial Arrangements

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: References National Protocol, Code for Completion by Post, Law Society formulas A/B/C, and specific protocol stages

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: Covers all key items - searches with time limits, mortgage offer and conditions, deposit arrangements, insurance from exchange, and contract documentation

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Explicitly references Law Society protocols, National Protocol, and Code for Completion by Post as authoritative sources
